mission.title: Primeros Pasos en Madrona
mission.description: Intro mission that teaches movement, weapon switching, vehicle entry, navigation, and first combat.

phases.title: Reach the contact point
phases.hint: Move with WASD. Reach the marked point.

phases.title: Equip the weapon
phases.hint: Press Q to cycle weapons and equip your sidearm.

phases.title: Enter a nearby vehicle
phases.hint: Approach the red car and press F to get in.

phases.title: Drive to the warehouse
phases.hint: Follow the golden marker to the warehouse district.

phases.title: Clear the warehouse exterior
phases.hint: Take down the gang members before they move the cargo.

phases.title: Secure the evidence
phases.hint: Move to the evidence marker and secure the scene.
